application.name: Leave Management System
application.description: A system that enables employees to submit leave requests, managers to approve or reject them, and HR admins to oversee leave types, balances, and history.

actors.name: Employee
actors.description: Submits leave requests, views own balances and history, modifies or cancels own requests

actors.name: Manager
actors.description: Approves or rejects leave requests for direct reports, adds comments

actors.name: HR Admin
actors.description: Manages leave types and balances, oversees all requests and history, maintains system configuration

in_scope: Leave request submission with type, dates, and reason
Modify and cancel of pending requests
out_of_scope_assumed: Payroll system integration (not mentioned in sources)
External calendar synchronisation (not mentioned in sources)
Leave accrual engine (not mentioned in sources)

application.release_intent: Initial release covering the full leave request and approval lifecycle
